Checklist Item: Semantic-to-div ratio above threshold; pages with >70% generic containers (div/span) flagged
Radio/checkbox groups wrapped in fieldset with legend; forms with 3+ related inputs have grouping
Accessible image role usage
CSS readable without minification

Avoid layout shift during load: all images and media have explicit width/height attributes or CSS aspect-ratio; font-display is set (swap/optional) in @font-face; no dynamic content inserted above the fold via JS on page load
No unused CSS selectors
Error messages follow consistent pattern (checked via regex); no raw string throws; error constants or error classes used
Modern ES6+ syntax used
Avoid memory leaks
No empty catch blocks
WCAG 2.1 AA compliance met
Visually-hidden patterns (.sr-only/.visually-hidden) use approved clip/position technique; no display:none or visibility:hidden on screen-reader-targeted text
No eval() or Function(string) usage
No render-blocking resources
No excessive JS bundles
README present; consistent file structure; average cyclomatic complexity below threshold; naming conventions consistent; JSDoc coverage above threshold
Duplicate code percentage within threshold
Custom error pages for 404 and 5xx HTTP responses exist in source; error pages include site branding and navigation back to homepage
No unused component props passed from parent to child; unused prop detection via static analysis or TypeScript strict mode

No AI-generated placeholder comments detected (e.g. '// TODO: implement this'; '// Add your code here'; '// This function does X' without actual logic); boilerplate comment patterns from code-generation tools flagged via regex
AI-generated code does not introduce copyleft license obligations; no verbatim code blocks matching GPL/AGPL-licensed open-source projects detected via code similarity scanning
Lighthouse performance score >= 75 on desktop and >= 65 on mobile; run via Chrome DevTools Lighthouse panel (Audits tab) with device and throttling set appropriately

LCP (Largest Contentful Paint) < 2.5s; CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift) < 0.1; INP (Interaction to Next Paint) < 200ms; verify via Chrome DevTools Performance panel recording or Lighthouse Core Web Vitals section

No JavaScript long tasks (> 50ms) blocking the main thread during page load; Total Blocking Time (TBT) within budget; verify via Chrome DevTools Performance panel Main thread flame chart and Lighthouse TBT metric
Time to First Byte (TTFB) < 800ms measured in Chrome DevTools Network panel Timing tab; no excessive DNS lookup or TCP/TLS connection time in waterfall

Content-Security-Policy (CSP) response header present with restrictive policy; no 'unsafe-inline' or 'unsafe-eval' directives without nonce/hash; verify in Chrome DevTools Network panel Response Headers for the main document request

Page layout tested at standard breakpoints using Chrome DevTools Device Toolbar responsive mode: 320px; 375px; 768px; 1024px; 1440px; no horizontal scrollbar at any mobile width; no content overflow or clipping detected

Page content reflows at 400% zoom without loss of information or functionality; no horizontal scrollbar required at 1280px width zoomed to 400% (equivalent to 320 CSS px viewport); verify via Chrome DevTools Device Toolbar set to 320px width (WCAG 1.4.10)

No resources loaded from origins not listed in Content-Security-Policy; CSP violations visible in Chrome DevTools Console as 'Refused to load' messages; each violation indicates a policy misconfiguration or an unauthorized resource
